formula.raw:
ifElse(
  contains([Form].[UniformLogoSelected],"William Adams AG"),
  "https://williamadams.sharepoint.com/sites/electronicforms/Style%20Library/WadamsLogos/WilliamAdamsAG.jpg",
ifElse(
  contains([Form].[UniformLogoSelected],"William Adams"),
  "https://williamadams.sharepoint.com/sites/electronicforms/Style%20Library/WadamsLogos/WilliamAdams.jpg",
ifElse(
  contains([Form].[UniformLogoSelected],"WA Institute of Training"),
  "https://williamadams.sharepoint.com/sites/electronicforms/Style%20Library/WadamsLogos/WAInstituteOfTraining.jpg",
ifElse(
  contains([Form].[UniformLogoSelected],"Rental"),
  "https://williamadams.sharepoint.com/sites/electronicforms/Style%20Library/WadamsLogos/Rental.jpg",
ifElse(
  contains([Form].[UniformLogoSelected],"WA Truck Centres"),
  "https://williamadams.sharepoint.com/sites/electronicforms/Style%20Library/WadamsLogos/WATruckCentres.jpg",
ifElse(
  contains([Form].[UniformLogoSelected],"Head Hunters"),
  "https://williamadams.sharepoint.com/sites/electronicforms/Style%20Library/WadamsLogos/HeadHunters.jpg",
""))))))

not((contains([SharePoint Columns].[Workflow Status],"Draft")
 || contains([SharePoint Columns].[Workflow Status],"Saved")))

not((contains([SharePoint Columns].[Workflow Status],"Draft")
 || contains([SharePoint Columns].[Workflow Status],"Saved")))

properties.name: Label 2
properties.text:
Lookup dont get it as html but Calc ctrl can ?!
https://williamadams.sharepoint.com/sites/electronicforms/Lists/Uniform/AllItems.aspx
https://williamadams.sharepoint.com/sites/electronicforms/Lists/UniformLogo/AllItems.aspx
1- get https://williamadams.sharepoint.com/sites/electronicforms/_api/web/lists/getbytitle('Uniform%20Logo')/items(3)
look for FieldValuesAsHtml
2- then https://williamadams.sharepoint.com/sites/electronicforms/_api/Web/Lists(guid'fd342ac9-98c9-49ed-8051-ccea1211fd38')/Items(3)/FieldValuesAsHtml  see src
